state.coderResponse:
All validation gates pass. Here's the final result summary.

## Summary

Implemented P1.M7.T1.S1 — the v1-stable public library surface in `pkg/stagehand`.

### Files delivered/modified

1. **`internal/generate/generate.go`** (MODIFIED, additive) — Added `Deps.DryRun bool` and `Deps.SystemExtra string` fields plus two behavior-preserving short-circuits:
   - `SystemExtra` append immediately after `prompt.BuildSystemPrompt(...)` (before `RecentSubjects`).
   - `DryRun` short-circuit after the `if !committed { Rescue... }` block and before the `(6) COMMIT block` — restores the signal handler, prints the message via `out.Resultf`, returns `Result{CommitSHA:"", ...}`.
   - Zero-valued fields ⇒ byte-identical M6.T1.S1 behavior (all existing tests stay green).

2. **`internal/generate/generate_test.go`** (MODIFIED, additive) — Extended `stubRunner.Run` to capture the `sys` arg (`lastSys` field); added `TestCommitStaged_DryRun` (asserts no CommitTree/CAS calls, no rescue, message returned, CommitSHA=="") and `TestCommitStaged_SystemExtra` (asserts `r.lastSys` contains the extra text).

3. **`pkg/stagehand/stagehand.go`** (NEW) — Owns `// Package stagehand`; exports `Options`, `Result`, `GenerateCommit`, and `Err*` aliases (each `// Stable as of v1.0`). `GenerateCommit` is a thin wrapper: `config.Load` → layer opts → resolve provider (opts > cfg > first-detected) + model (opts > cfg > manifest.DefaultModel) → wire `git.New(".")`/`provider.NewExecutor(".")`/`ui.NewOutput` → `generate.CommitStaged` → map to public `Result{+Provider,+Model}`. NEVER stages, NEVER `os.Exit`.

4. **`pkg/stagehand/stagehand_test.go`** (NEW) — Integration tests against a real temp git repo + compiled stub agent binary: `TestGenerateCommit_DryRun` (HEAD unchanged, CommitSHA=="", message returned, Provider/Model resolved), `TestGenerateCommit_Default` (real commit, CommitSHA==new HEAD, subject in `git log`), `TestGenerateCommit_AutoResolveProvider`. Tests are hermetic via a repo-local `.stagehand.toml` (`[defaults]` overrides the host's global config per FR34).

### Validation gates (all green)
- **Level 1**: `go vet ./pkg/stagehand/ ./internal/generate/` ✓
- **Level 2**: `gofmt -l pkg/stagehand internal/generate` empty ✓
- **Level 3**: `go test ./internal/generate/ -v` — 47 tests pass (incl. all M6.T1.S1 originals + 2 new) ✓
- **Level 4**: `go test ./pkg/stagehand/ -v` — 3 tests pass ✓
- **Level 5**: `go test ./...` — all 8 packages green, no regressions ✓

### Scope checks (all satisfied)
- `// Stable as of v1.0` present on Options, Result, GenerateCommit, and all 3 Err* aliases ✓
- No `git add`/`AddAll`/`HasStagedChanges` call sites in stagehand.go (only doc-comment prose) ✓
- No `os.Exit` call sites in stagehand.go (only doc-comment prose) ✓

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "P1.M7.T1.S1 implemented in one pass. pkg/stagehand/stagehand.go exposes the v1-stable public API (Options, Result, GenerateCommit, Err* aliases) as a thin wrapper delegating to internal/generate.CommitStaged, with additive DryRun + SystemExtra seams in generate.go (behavior-identical at zero values). All 5 validation gates pass: go vet clean, gofmt clean, go test ./internal/generate/ (47 tests incl. 2 new seam tests + all M6.T1.S1 originals), go test ./pkg/stagehand/ (3 integration tests: DryRun leaves HEAD unchanged with CommitSHA='', default path creates a real commit with CommitSHA==new HEAD, provider/model auto-resolve), and go test ./... (8 packages green, no regressions). Scope checks confirmed: 'Stable as of v1.0' on every exported symbol, no git add/AddAll/HasStagedChanges, no os.Exit in stagehand.go. Note: the host's global ~/.config/stagehand/config.toml sets a real provider/model, so the integration tests register the stub via a repo-local .stagehand.toml [defaults] table (FR34: repo file > global file) to stay hermetic — the implementation's opts>cfg>manifest resolution is correct per PRD §14.1."
}
```

coderResult.message: P1.M7.T1.S1 implemented in one pass. pkg/stagehand/stagehand.go exposes the v1-stable public API (Options, Result, GenerateCommit, Err* aliases) as a thin wrapper delegating to internal/generate.CommitStaged, with additive DryRun + SystemExtra seams in generate.go (behavior-identical at zero values). All 5 validation gates pass: go vet clean, gofmt clean, go test ./internal/generate/ (47 tests incl. 2 new seam tests + all M6.T1.S1 originals), go test ./pkg/stagehand/ (3 integration tests: DryRun leaves HEAD unchanged with CommitSHA='', default path creates a real commit with CommitSHA==new HEAD, provider/model auto-resolve), and go test ./... (8 packages green, no regressions). Scope checks confirmed: 'Stable as of v1.0' on every exported symbol, no git add/AddAll/HasStagedChanges, no os.Exit in stagehand.go. Note: the host's global ~/.config/stagehand/config.toml sets a real provider/model, so the integration tests register the stub via a repo-local .stagehand.toml [defaults] table (FR34: repo file > global file) to stay hermetic — the implementation's opts>cfg>manifest resolution is correct per PRD §14.1.

Note: the host's global ~/.config/stagehand/config.toml sets a real provider/model, so the integration tests register the stub via a repo-local .stagehand.toml [defaults] table (FR34: repo file > global file) to stay hermetic — the implementation's opts>cfg>manifest resolution is correct per PRD §14.1.
